# Election Data Inventory

**Last Updated**: 2026-05-12T20:14:05Z (auto-generated)

Generated by `python -m yen_gov coverage`. Do not hand-edit. Re-run after every ingest. Source of truth for declared coverage is [datasets/reference/in/election-events.json](../../datasets/reference/in/election-events.json); on-disk artifacts live under [datasets/elections/](../../datasets/elections/).

## Summary

- 19 (state, event) slices on disk across 19 states / 7 cohorts.
- 2,568 per-AC result artifacts emitted in total.
- 12 state(s) / UT(s) with a legislative assembly are not yet in the catalogue at all (see "Missing" below).

## Missing (no entry in the events catalogue)

These states/UTs have a legislative assembly but no `event_id` registered in [election-events.json](../../datasets/reference/in/election-events.json). Adding one means: (a) appending a `(state, year) -> EventInfo` row to [backend/yen_gov/sources/eci/events.py](../../backend/yen_gov/sources/eci/events.py), (b) writing the cohort metadata at `datasets/events/in/eci/<event_id>/election.json`, then (c) `python -m yen_gov eci-statreport-emit <state> <year>`. UTs without an assembly (Andaman, Chandigarh, Dadra & NH, Lakshadweep, Ladakh) are intentionally excluded — they elect Lok Sabha MPs only.

| Goa | `S05` | state |
| Gujarat | `S06` | state |
| Himachal Pradesh | `S08` | state |
| Karnataka | `S10` | state |

| Punjab | `S19` | state |
| Rajasthan | `S20` | state |

| Uttar Pradesh | `S24` | state |
| Uttarakhand | `S28` | state |
